title: licaria cymbarum
intro: Licaria cymbarum, also known as the white laurel or white bay, is a plant species in the family Lauraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and bronchodilatory properties. Licaria cymbarum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine in some parts of the world.
